title: abutilon ramiflorum
intro: Abutilon ramiflorum, also known as the tree mallows, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Abutilon ramiflorum include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. Abutilon ramiflorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, making it a versatile plant used in traditional medicine.
